items.title: Sources: Byard, NFL's INTs leader in '25, to Pats
items.summary: Free agent safety Kevin Byard III has agreed to sign with the Patriots on a one-year, $9 million deal, according to NFL Network.

items.title: Colts, QB Jones agree to 2-year, $88M contract
items.summary: The Colts and quarterback Daniel Jones reached agreement Wednesday on a two-year, $88 million contract that can be worth up to $100 million, his agents told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

items.summary: The Jets have agreed to a two-year contract worth up to $20 million with guard Dylan Parham, according to NFL Network.

items.title: Memo: Tisches ask to move Giants stake to trusts

items.title: Colts, Daniel Jones agree on new contract
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS – The Indianapolis Colts and Daniel Jones are transitioning from the transition tag. The team and its starting quarterback agreed on a 2-year, $88 million extension that replaces the one-year, $37.833 million transition tag that was put in place March 3, according to a source. Jones could earn up to $100 million in incentives [...]
